data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of mileage tracking for reimbursement. While the use case mentions tracking 127 miles, there is no concrete evidence of an API endpoint or persisted state check that confirms this functionality is implemented and operational. The lack of specific evidence to demonstrate that the mileage tracking feature is functioning as required leads to a conclusion of a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an API endpoint or persisted state check confirming the implementation of mileage tracking for reimbursement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
